nasb.text: Take again some of them and throw them into the fire and burn them in the fire; from it a fire will spread to all the house of Israel.

esv.text: And of these again you shall take some and cast them into the midst of the fire and burn them in the fire. From there a fire will come out into all the house of Israel.

cnv.text: 再從這幾根鬚髮中取一部分投在火裡焚燒；火必從那裡蔓延到以色列全家。”

ccb.text: 再从中取出几根丢在火里焚烧，必有火从这里燃起，蔓延到整个以色列。”
